findings.description: 16 legacy seeds identified in harvest. Only 7 marked direct-port. None explicitly in current suite as ability_seed records.
findings.recommendation: Promote the 7 direct_port candidates into ability_seed model after CMPLX-Standards gate validation.

findings.description: 5 triads and 3 octads defined as candidate assemblies. These are composite groupings, not individual records.
findings.recommendation: Triads/octads belong in a higher-level assembly model (not yet defined). Consider adding 'assembly_cluster' model.

findings.description: 24 unique blockers preventing legacy seed promotion: ['avoid_duplicate_canonicalization', 'choose_mmdb_contract', 'coin_library_scope_review', 'convert_markdown_registry_to_structured_index', 'decouple_http_service_assumptions', 'dedupe_lattice_implementations', 'dedupe_three_registry_surfaces', 'dirty_repo_scope_review']...
findings.recommendation: Resolve blockers or document as accepted residues. Many are CMPLX-Standards gate prerequisites.

findings.description: 1301 of 9392 registry rows flagged (13.9%). Top skip reasons: {'substantive_content_in_low_type': 452, 'slot_keyword_present': 348, 'pipeline_action_mismatch': 297, 'path_naming_convention': 204}.
findings.recommendation: ROUTE_SLOT (254) and REGISTER_TOOL (43) recommendations should be actioned.

findings.description: 3 FLCR papers in skip audit top findings were marked MANUAL_REVIEW but heuristics suggest ROUTE_SLOT.
findings.recommendation: All FLCR papers (FLCR-01 through FLCR-40) should be in assembled_paper or normal_form models. Verify none are missing.

findings.description: NIST legacy diff contains peer_recommendation and apply_next for each FLCR-01..40. These fields are NOT in current assembled_paper or normal_form model contracts.
findings.recommendation: Create a 'peer_review_metadata' sub-model or extension to capture NIST-derived peer recommendations without polluting model fit.

findings.description: Each NIST record has 6 standard-level checks (claim_coverage, obligation_continuity, etc.). Current suite abstracts these into fit_score but loses granularity.
findings.recommendation: Consider preserving per-standard granularity as optional extensions for audit traceability.

findings.description: CLOSURE_INCLUSION_PASS_STATE exists but was not inspected in detail. It may contain additional records or bindings not reflected in current suite.
findings.recommendation: Ingest and diff against current suite if closure pass produced new records.
